stemHtml: Which of the following documents or publications should a Pilot-in-Command consult, in order to receive information regarding bird migrations for a specific area or route?

options.a: Notes on relevant Instrument Approach Procedures Charts.
options.b: ICAO Doc 9332 Manual on the ICAO Bird Strike Information System (IBIS).
options.c: IATA Almanac of Bird Strike Reports and Migration Routes.
